tasks.label: mvn-package
args: if exist .mvn\wrapper\maven-wrapper.jar (call mvnw.cmd -q -DskipTests -Dmaven.repo.local="${workspaceFolder}\.m2\repository" package) else (call mvn -q -DskipTests -Dmaven.repo.local="${workspaceFolder}\.m2\repository" package)

tasks.label: mvn-copy-deps
args: if exist .mvn\wrapper\maven-wrapper.jar (call mvnw.cmd -q -DskipTests -Dmaven.repo.local="${workspaceFolder}\.m2\repository" dependency:copy-dependencies -DoutputDirectory=target/dependency) else (call mvn -q -DskipTests -Dmaven.repo.local="${workspaceFolder}\.m2\repository" dependency:copy-dependencies -DoutputDirectory=target/dependency)

tasks.label: mvn-test-compile
args: if exist .mvn\wrapper\maven-wrapper.jar (call mvnw.cmd -q -Dmaven.repo.local="${workspaceFolder}\.m2\repository" test-compile) else (call mvn -q -Dmaven.repo.local="${workspaceFolder}\.m2\repository" test-compile)

tasks.label: spring-boot-run-local-debug
args: if exist .mvn\wrapper\maven-wrapper.jar (call mvnw.cmd -Dspring-boot.run.profiles=local -Dspring-boot.run.jvmArguments="-agentlib:jdwp=transport=dt_socket,server=y,suspend=n,address=5005" spring-boot:run) else (call mvn -Dspring-boot.run.profiles=local -Dspring-boot.run.jvmArguments="-agentlib:jdwp=transport=dt_socket,server=y,suspend=n,address=5005" spring-boot:run)
